_registration: VERDICT 077 fixtures — idea-engine PROPOSAL 064 'cascade independence quota' (ideas/fleet/cascade-independence-quota-2026-07-15.md @ idea-engine main 256ea5c910d1d18856e0570cf3c8766685e7cde6, landed via idea-engine PR #427 merge head 10d460d). Every model constant below is copied verbatim from the PROPOSAL 064 outbox block / idea doc (invented-but-pinned there; where the doc and the outbox block disagree, the block wins — no disagreement found). Fully hermetic: the runner reads ONLY this file; zero repo/network reads at verdict time (the P017-P063 hermetic precedent). This file is committed BEFORE the runner exists (the V072-V076 registration discipline; no fix-forwards — the first complete run of the registered pipeline is the accepted run).

world.conditioning: all published accuracies computed conditioned theta = A; the in-sim SYMMETRY gate (relabel A<->B, signals flipped) certifies the unconditional values equal the conditioned ones
world.tie_break: FOLLOW-OWN-SIGNAL (pinned convention token; theorems are convention-conditional; the random tie-break is the named follow-up)
world.bayes_rule: action from likelihood ratios (p/q)^lead over the revealed lead; strict posterior preference acts on it; indifference follows own signal; gated consequences (F1, never assumed): pre-cascade agents act own signal, the revealed lead is a +/-1 walk absorbed at |lead| = 2, absorbed agents copy the herd, cascades never break
world.quota_mechanism: independence quota k — agents 1..k mandated to act = own signal, indices public (their actions reveal their signals exactly); post-quota lead L_k = 2*Bin(k, p) - k; |L_k| >= 2 cascades immediately, else the walk resumes

metrics.ruin: h(l) = P(hit -2 before +2 | lead l), l in {-1, 0, 1}, exact Fraction
metrics.welfare: V(N, k, p) = k*p + sum_{i>k} acc_i (unweighted sum of per-agent correctness over the known horizon)
metrics.optimal_quota: k*(N, p) = argmax_k V, ties broken to the smallest k, ties reported; runner-up margins reported
metrics.majority_benchmark: majority of N i.i.d. signals, exact, REPORTING-ONLY (convention C6: even-N ties credited 1/2)

decision_rule.INVALID: any F1-F6 gate failure (controls misbehaving — report, no ruling)
NULL_axes: band-straddle (G in (2,6), or k* in {3,4}, or the e-halving clause alone fails)
twin-arm disagreement surviving the INVALID diagnosis

gates.F1: model & Bayes identities — action table re-derived from likelihood ratios incl. tie-break (pre-cascade agents provably act own signal; absorption at |lead|=2; cascades never break); state-mass conservation at every DP step (sum = 1 exact); every acc_i in [0,1]; V(N,N) = N*p exactly; the theta-relabeling SYMMETRY gate (the theta=B run reproduces every published number)
gates.F2: the three structure theorems, exact at every grid cell — (a) QUOTA-NULL: k in {0,1,2} identical e AND identical V at every (N,p); (b) PARITY: e(2m+1) = e(2m+2) for every published m >= 1 (and e(0)=e(1)=e(2)), with the finite-horizon strictness check V(N, 2m+2) < V(N, 2m+1) at every grid cell for every computed m >= 1; (c) harmonic identities h(0) = q*h(-1) + p*h(1), h(1) = q*h(0), h(-1) = q + p*h(0), plus the KNIFE-EDGE decomposition with reference 441/14500 at (7/10, m=1)
gates.F4: the hand world — p = 2/3: h = (7/15, 1/5, 1/15), e(3) = 23/135, V(6, 3) = 350/81, by the pinned pencil walk
gates.F5: the p = 1/2 degeneracy — e(k) = 1/2 for EVERY k and V(N, k) = N/2 exactly
gates.F6: battery — Arm B reproduces every Arm-A published number exactly; the 2^12 exhaustive path census at N = 12 (every grid p, every k <= 12) equals BOTH arms exactly; k* interior (k* <= 118); twin independently-written decision evaluators agree on the ruling token; Arm-R draw-count sentinels (1 + N per episode) counted and asserted; aux seed 20261566 never read; stdout + results.json byte-identical across two process runs; CPython minor pinned (3.11) and asserted

arms.A: DECISION arm, seedless — forward exact-Fraction absorbing-walk DP over states {lead -1, 0, 1, cascade-A, cascade-B} with the Binomial quota initial condition; h by direct substitution closed-form solve; binomial pmf via math.comb
arms.B: twin, seedless, INDEPENDENTLY-WRITTEN — backward memoized recursion W(agents-remaining, lead-or-cascade); h by Fraction Gaussian elimination on the 3-state linear system; binomial pmf via Pascal-triangle recursion; must reproduce every Arm-A published number EXACTLY; powers the second decision evaluator (integer cross-multiplication band logic)
arms.census: algorithm-free gate — exhaustive enumeration of all 2^12 signal paths at N = 12, every grid p, every k <= 12; each free agent's action re-derived from the likelihood-ratio posterior over its literal observed action history (never the walk shortcut); V(12, k, p) and the per-agent accuracy trajectory equal to BOTH arms exactly
arms.R: seeded REPORTING-ONLY trace of the literal 100-agent process at the decision cell, k in {0, k*}: 100000 episodes on random.Random(20261563), pinned draw order 1 theta-uniform + N signal-uniforms per episode, draw counts (1 + N per episode) counted and asserted; stability leg random.Random(20261564) at 20000; presentation shuffle 20261565 (read by the shuffled stdout cell listing only); NO statistical gate rides Arm R — a trace drift from the exact curves is a named finding, never a ruling

seeds.note: 20261563-566 strictly above the fleet high-water 20261562 (V074's registration; re-swept FIRSTHAND this session at sim-lab origin/main aa8627e with the boundary-aware regex — max genuine 20261562; 202670087 is the documented decimal-fraction data-not-seed specimen). NEW REGISTRY HIGH-WATER 20261566 (reserved; highest READ 20261565).

fixture_level_conventions.C1: theta draw: theta = A iff Fraction(u) < 1/2 strict, else B; signal correct iff Fraction(u) < p strict (exact-rational comparison, no float thresholds)
fixture_level_conventions.C2: paired Arm-R evaluation: one (theta, signals) draw set per episode, evaluated on BOTH k cells {0, k*} (dynamics never read mint of the other cell; draw count stays 1 + N per episode)
fixture_level_conventions.C3: Arm-R per-episode EXACTNESS cross-check (structural, pass probability 1 for a correct implementation): on every episode the literal likelihood-ratio agent process and the abstract walk-shortcut process run on the SAME draws and must produce identical action sequences — the reporting arm doubles as a grammar check of the F1 consequence on sampled paths
fixture_level_conventions.C4: e(k, p) is the infinite-horizon wrong-cascade probability (N-independent); Arm R reports the finite-horizon wrong-cascade frequency at N = 100 plus the not-yet-absorbed fraction beside it — the difference is the horizon, disclosed, never gated
fixture_level_conventions.C5: published exact surface scope: full exact e(k, p) curves (k 0..120, every grid p) and the full V(N, k, p) surface (every k in the window, all 12 grid cells) as canonical num/den strings + repr(float) renderings; per-agent accuracy trajectories published exact for the decision cell k in {0, k*} (Arm B reproduces them exactly; the census gates trajectories at N = 12); control-p surfaces gated (F3/F5), published as summary rows
fixture_level_conventions.C6: majority-of-N-independent-signals benchmark (reporting-only): maj(N, p) = P(Bin(N, p) > N/2) + (1/2)*P(Bin(N, p) = N/2) — even-N ties credited half
fixture_level_conventions.C7: canonical serialization: Fractions as {num, den} decimal strings (already-reduced), floats via repr(), json sort_keys = True, no timestamps in results.json or stdout
fixture_level_conventions.C8: parity strictness (F2b second clause) evaluated at grid p only (at the p = 1/2 and p = 1 controls V is k-flat by F5/F3 — equality, not strictness, is the gated fact there), for every m >= 1 with 2m+2 <= min(N, 120)
fixture_level_conventions.C9: knife-edge decomposition verified for every m >= 1 with 2m+1 <= 120 at every grid p (P(L = +/-2) means EXACTLY +/-2)
fixture_level_conventions.C10: individual-rationality wedge (reporting-only): sacrifice = sum_{i<=k*}(acc_i(0) - p), recovery = sum_{i>k*}(acc_i(k*) - acc_i(0)), G = recovery - sacrifice asserted exactly
fixture_level_conventions.C11: runner-up = the best k != k* by V (ties inside the runner-up set resolved to smallest k); margin = V(k*) - V(runner-up), reported never decision-read
fixture_level_conventions.C12: the aux-seed assertion is enforced by a constructor registry: every random.Random construction logs its seed; the registry must equal {20261563, 20261564, 20261565} exactly and never contain 20261566

drafter_disclosed_never_gated.note: the drafting prototype's disclosed landing, re-derived from scratch this session and COMPARED, never gated (the P048-P063 closed-form-arm norm); any mismatch is a named finding

runtime_pins.determinism: stdout + results.json byte-identical across two full process runs (external diff + sha256, hashes in REPORT.md)
